domain_and_context.target_audience: Children aged 8-18 in quiet clinical/educational setting
domain_and_context.display: 32-inch physical display, 9:16 portrait orientation, 1080x1920 px target resolution

theme_and_archetype.archetype: Atmospheric Deep Space (Variant of Archetype 5 Jewel & Luxury + Archetype 1 Calm)
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Destiny 2 UI meets Monument Valley warmth. Calm, purposeful, adventurous, never stressful.

background.name: Deep Navy Space
background.usage: Base scene background and solid container backgrounds.

primary.name: Cyan Accent
primary.usage: Key accent color for target icons, active state, glowing accents, and primary buttons.

success.name: Lime Green
success.usage: Streak celebrations, correct feedback overlays, and level completion indicators.

warning.name: Amber
warning.usage: Missed targets, time warnings, or alert states.

secondary.name: Nebula Violet
secondary.usage: Subtle complementary color for nebula clouds, inactive elements, or rim lighting.

surface.usage: HUD backgrounds, modal overlays, and elevated cards.

primary.usage: General UI text, headings, instructions, buttons, and summary stats.

numeric.usage: Scores, levels, target counts, and timers. Enhances the 'scientifically designed' space feel.

spacing_and_layout.hud_positioning: Top 8% of screen. absolute top-0 left-0 right-0 h-[8vh] z-50
spacing_and_layout.bottom_action_area: Bottom 12% of screen. absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-[12vh] z-50 flex items-center justify-center pb-8 px-8

glassmorphism.usage: HUD container, Start screen cards, and Summary modal.

solid.usage: Input fields and static non-overlay panels.

trial_phases.response: Touch interaction enabled. Highlight touched targets with #00B4D8.
trial_phases.feedback: Correct hits flash #06D6A0, incorrect misses flash #F4A261.

motion_and_interactions.celebration: Framer motion staggered entrance for streak banners (y: 50 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1) with slight overshoot.

start_screen.layout: Centered glassmorphism card (max-w-md w-full) over 3D background.
elements: Input: Nickname entry field (h-16, rounded-xl, border-2 border-[#00B4D8]/50 bg-transparent text-center text-xl text-white focus:border-[#00B4D8] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00B4D8])

hud.layout: Flex container, items-center, justify-between w-full h-full px-8

elements.score_left: Score value in Orbitron (text-[#00B4D8] text-4xl font-bold) with 'SCORE' label underneath.
elements.level_center: Glassmorphism Pill displaying 'LVL' + number in Orbitron (text-white).
elements.targets_right: Row of small spaceship icons indicating targets to track. Color-coded based on phase.
elements.pause: Top-right absolute or integrated into target area, min 60x60 touch target.

confirm_button.layout: Large floating pill button spanning 80% width in the bottom 12% area.
confirm_button.classes: w-full max-w-sm h-20 rounded-full bg-[#00B4D8] text-white text-3xl font-bold font-primary tracking-widest shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,180,216,0.3)] hover:bg-[#0096B4] hover:shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(0,180,216,0.5)] active:scale-95 transition-all

feedback_banners.layout: Absolute positioned dead center or just below HUD.
feedback_banners.success: Text 'PERFECT!' or 'STREAK!' in text-[#06D6A0] font-orbitron text-5xl with text-shadow glow.
feedback_banners.warning: Text 'MISSED ONE' in text-[#F4A261] font-primary text-3xl.

elements: Stats Grid: 2-column bento grid for Total Score, Accuracy, Max Streak.
Actions: 'Export Log' (secondary button outline) and 'Play Again' (primary button solid).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: All text must meet WCAG AA contrast ratio. HUD glassmorphism must have enough opacity to ensure legibility over the 3D scene.
accessibility_and_testing.touch: Strict adherence to 60x60px minimum touch targets.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='start-game-button', data-testid='score-display').

background_nebula.description: Ethereal blue nebula texture. To be used as the environment map, background texture, or blended with R3F <Stars> component to create the deep navy/purple/cyan space backdrop.

hud_icons.strategy: Use Lucide-React or Phosphor Icons for minimalist geometric shapes. Avoid complex SVG illustrations to maintain the Destiny 2 clinical cleanliness.

three_js_guidelines.lighting: Soft ambient light (intensity 0.5), directional rim lighting (cyan and purple) to separate dark objects from the dark background.
three_js_guidelines.materials: MeshStandardMaterial with high roughness and subtle metalness for the spaceships/asteroids. Unlit glowing materials (MeshBasicMaterial) for active targets.
three_js_guidelines.performance: Limit post-processing (Bloom) if it drops frame rate below 60fps on typical 32-inch displays. The game must run flawlessly.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the 3D space scene using R3F and map the background_nebula URL to a texture or background environment.
Implement the 9:16 portrait layout tightly. The canvas should be fixed absolute covering the screen.
Overlay the UI using absolute positioning (HUD top 8%, Confirm Button bottom 12%).
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the UI overlays rather than rigid UI libraries to allow custom spacing and glassmorphism.
Ensure the trial sequence logic correctly drives the state and visuals in R3F (cue -> isi -> motion -> response -> feedback).
Incorporate Framer Motion for UI transitions (Start Screen fading out, Streak celebrations dropping in).
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or other generic fonts. Use 'Outfit' for UI and 'Orbitron' for numbers.
Implement data-testid on every clickable or tracking element.
